response.justification: A highly experienced full-stack engineer (~15 years) with strong software craftsmanship, TypeScript/Node.js depth, AWS CDK exposure at Optilyz, and recent staff-level work on MCP code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq, which aligns with several of the role's emerging-tech requirements. However, the resume shows limited demonstrated experience with the core GenAI stack the role demands: no listed Python, and no concrete evidence of building RAG architectures, vector databases, data pipelines for unstructured data, or shipping 8+ years of production AI solutions. The relevant AI work appears to span only the most recent ~6 months. Staff-level engineering maturity and customer-facing potential are plausible, making this a borderline candidate worth a screening conversation to probe depth of GenAI delivery.
strengths: Deep, broad engineering experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js and AWS CDK background
Recent hands-on work with MCP, agentic workflows, and AI-agent infrastructure
Demonstrated technical leadership, mentoring, and craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, talks)
concerns: Python not listed and no clear evidence of RAG, vector DBs, or LLM optimization experience
AI/GenAI exposure appears limited to a recent ~6-month stint, short of 8+ years production AI
No data-pipeline-for-unstructured-data evidence; recent career gap and only basic German

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflow experience
Strong general engineering and cloud (AWS) seniority
